decisions.subject: Production pipeline

options_considered.label: animation
options_considered.reason: Possible but optimized for longer motion-graphics pieces

options_considered.label: cinematic
options_considered.reason: Wrong grammar for a science explainer

decisions.reason: User requested a 30-second animated explainer about photosynthesis — matches generated explainer pipeline.

decisions.subject: Composition render runtime

options_considered.label: Remotion (React scene stack)
options_considered.reason: Available on machine — text_card, stat_card, hero_title, diagram overlays, word-level captions

options_considered.label: HyperFrames (HTML/CSS/GSAP)
options_considered.reason: Rejected — FFmpeg not on PATH; hyperframes doctor would fail

options_considered.label: FFmpeg-only concat
options_considered.reason: Rejected — ffmpeg binary not on PATH; insufficient for animated explainer grammar

decisions.reason: Only Remotion is available. Recommended for this brief: existing React scene types (text_card, hero_title, stat_card) fit equation-led 30s edu motion. HyperFrames unavailable until FFmpeg is installed.

decisions.subject: Composition authoring mode

options_considered.label: Atelier (hand-authored)
options_considered.reason: Higher craft but overkill for 30s standard edu brief

decisions.reason: 30-second educational equation walkthrough fits templated Remotion scenes; atelier reserved for hero/brand work.

decisions.subject: Visual style playbook

options_considered.label: flat-motion-graphics
options_considered.reason: Bold icons, fast pace, social-native — pipeline recommended

decisions.reason: Energetic motion graphics with purple/teal palette fits photosynthesis inputs/outputs animation.

decisions.subject: Background music plan

options_considered.label: ElevenLabs / Suno generation
options_considered.reason: No music generation API keys configured

decisions.reason: Pixabay music search is the only music path available without new API keys.

decisions.subject: Narration TTS provider

options_considered.label: Piper local (en_US-lessac-medium)
options_considered.reason: User installed Piper at C:/piper after TTS blocker

decisions.reason: User installed Piper and said continue; batch narration generated locally at zero cost.
